mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.name, t.slug, COUNT(pt.post_id) AS post_count FROM tag t LEFT JOIN post_tag pt ON pt.tag_id = t.id LEFT JOIN post p ON p.id = pt.post_id AND p.status = 1 AND p.deleted = 0 GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY post_count DESC
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.slug, 0 AS post_count FROM tag t INNER JOIN post_tag pt ON pt.tag_id = t.id WHERE pt.post_id = #{postId}
